description:
Currently godeps-gen.nix uses `src = ../..;` which copies the entire repo to the Nix store.

Should use Nix file sets (https://nix.dev/tutorials/working-with-local-files.html#file-sets) to include only the necessary files:
- go.mod, go.sum
- cmd/godeps-gen/
- go/pkg/godeps/

This improves build efficiency and avoids unnecessary rebuilds when unrelated files change.
title: Use Nix file sets for Go package sources
